title: Goopy
description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
restrictions: Defend cards only (must have Defend tag)
notes: On enchant, the card gains the Exhaust keyword. The enchantment tracks an Amount starting at 1; each time the enchanted card is played, Amount increments by 1 (both in combat and in the deck). The block bonus applied is Amount−1, so the card permanently gains +1 block for each time it has been played.
